scope: development-only; frozen-test labels and metrics excluded
selection_policy: Select parameters and approximately-70%-recall threshold using folds 1-3 only; evaluate unchanged on fold 4.

hist_gradient_boosting_focused_tuning.selection_rule: Highest mean PR-AUC on the first three rolling development folds; latest fold excluded from selection.

external_challenger.reason: XGBoost is not installed in the current environment; optional external evaluation was skipped without changing core dependencies.

decision: No final model decision made. Comparison is provided for review.
